_note: Pipeline fields (def_, atk_min/max, size, race, element, element_level, is_boss, level, hp, mdef) at top level for backward compat. Stats in nested 'stats' dict. mode is a sparse dict (only true flags stored; absence implies false). drops/mvp_drops stored as [{item, chance}] arrays to handle duplicate AegisName keys. element_level 0 clamped to 1 (invalid for attr_fix table). Commented-out entries (/* ... */) excluded. ViewData excluded.
